mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_settlement (order_id, merchant_id, runner_id, gross_cents, merchant_cents, runner_cents, status, idempotency_key, settled_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{merchantId}, #{runnerId}, #{grossCents}, #{merchantCents}, #{runnerCents}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{settledAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE order_settlement SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
